components.description: Foundational user action component that handles form submissions, standard click events, internal routing, and external hyperlinks.
useCases: Primary, secondary, and tertiary contextual layout call-to-actions (CTAs).
Seamless application navigation via React Router without rewriting logic.

children.description: The text or nested elements rendered inside the button body.

variant.description: The structural aesthetic style theme of the button.

size.description: The dimensional sizing tier affecting height, padding, and typography.

startIcon.description: Material Symbols icon key identifier rendered before the text content.

endIcon.description: Material Symbols icon key identifier rendered after the text content.

loading.description: Toggles an absolute interactive lock and displays a rotating loading wheel indicator.

disabled.description: Disables element pointer events and drops opacity.

onClick.description: Callback triggered upon a clean mouse click event.

navigateTo.description: React Router path destination string triggered on successfully clicked states.

href.description: External target URL string; shifts the structural DOM rendering layer to an anchor <a> element.

type.description: The default structural HTML button action behavior attribute.

variants.contained: High-emphasis standard background coloring with text-white matching active app core palettes.
variants.outlined: Low-emphasis transparent backdrop enclosed within thin border bounding limits.
variants.text: Zero-border layout footprint that matches text configurations, shifting colors only on active pointer hover tags.
variants.danger: Alert-red high visibility theme intended for data destructions and system deletions.
variants.success: Emerald-green aesthetic pattern for operational confirmations, saves, and wizard completion checkpoints.

internalFeatures: Polymorphic DOM Shifting: Natively intercepts the presence of an `href` attribute to swap structural tags from `<button>` to `<a>` seamlessly.
Built-in Micro-Animations: Incorporates scaling down transforms (`active:scale-95`) and layout transitions to optimize tactile interactivity.
Loading State Interception: Automatically maps the `progress_activity` spin loader to the screen layout while locking the click callbacks from firing downstream execution routines.

components.description: A streamlined input entry field built as a modular wrapper surrounding BaseInput components following strict Separation of Concerns constraints.
useCases: Text collection grids inside standard creation forms.
String search inputs and filtering control structures.
Sanitized data-entry fields where leading or trailing spaces could invalidate database queries.

type.description: Defines the specific functional HTML input target type variant.

trim.description: Enables automatic string whitespace trimming routines upon trigger execution.

onBlur.description: Standard action event callback dispatched when the element loses operational focus.

ref.description: Forwarded reference pointer allowing parents direct DOM traversal mechanisms.

variants.Standard: Inherits full operational UI/UX traits directly from the baseline BaseInput schema registry definitions.

internalFeatures: Ref Forwarding Architecture: Employs `React.forwardRef` to pass DOM boundaries directly to underlying interactive elements without breaking lifecycle models.
Automated Value Sanitization: Implements an atomic text-trimming execution routine on blur, filtering structural spacing anomalies automatically before form data compilation hooks execute.

components.description: Highly dense informational component dedicated to charting operational parameters, metrics, performance indicators, and financial trends.
useCases: Admin control hub tracking financial margins or earnings.
Statistical breakdowns showing specific customer/student counts inside tracking lists.
Dashboard overview matrix arrays displaying operational thresholds.

label.description: The textual title identifier of the statistic being displayed.

value.description: The actual dynamic record numeric total or formatted text value string.

icon.description: The Material Symbols name glyph shown within the right contextual quadrant.

size.description: Dimensional bounds dictionary controlling density scale levels.

variant.description: Color palette profile defining indicators, borders, text, and asset background layouts.

trend.description: An auxiliary micro-trend component badge nested immediately adjacent to the value metric stack.

isCount.description: Flags formatting rules; if set to false, numeric values default to localized Indian Rupee currency strings.

variants.neutral: Slate color configuration optimized for structural balance across neutral metrics.
variants.success: Emerald hue highlighting positive performance milestones or balanced financial ledgers.
variants.warning: Amber theme providing high operational warning feedback metrics.
variants.danger: Rose red coloring mapping system failures, deficit calculations, or missing allocations.
variants.info: Blue aesthetic styling explicitly meant for general structural categorization flags.

internalFeatures: Context-Aware Localization: Natively interprets the value type and `isCount` parameters, implementing automatic currency conversions using `toLocaleString()` to properly prefix metrics with the `₹` symbol.
Micro-Elevations: Integrates micro-interaction vectors (`hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md`) to elevate spatial depth visibility in real-time.

Granular Fluid Sizing Rulesets: Maintains hardcoded dimension configurations mapping layout metrics seamlessly across specific layout viewports (ranging from micro-cards `h-14` to desktop metrics `h-24`).

components.description: Compact uppercase status label component highlighting classifications, micro-indicators, and current record attributes.
useCases: Data column status rows (e.g., Active, Expired, Pending logs).
Role identifiers tracking specialized application access matrices.
High-density categorization chips embedded in complex data structures.

children.description: The text string content displayed inside the badge.

variant.description: The status color palette configuration mapping text backgrounds.

variants.default: Subtle slate design optimized for neutral states with native dark mode support.
variants.primary: App standard brand theme utilizing low-opacity background tint matrices.
variants.warning: Amber tint displaying low-level system exceptions or warnings.
variants.danger: Red high-contrast indicator alerting critical actions or systemic failures.
variants.info: Blue layout accent applied to general category definitions.

internalFeatures: Dark Mode Synchronization: Integrates dynamic Tailwind variant tags (`dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300`) to guarantee accessibility values scale correctly when switching operational themes.
Micro-Typography Alignment: Enforces precise layout uniformity using tracking-wide transformations, bold capitalization rules, and strict flex center positioning.

components.description: Structural layout utility serving as the primary content bounding container, using sub-components to segment headers, body layouts, and action footers.
useCases: Decoupled block modules separating data visualizer layers.
Information display cards holding complex analytical configurations.

children.description: Composite structural layout containing internal card structures.

variant.description: The theme profile layer determining background and border colors.

onClick.description: Callback that converts the structural container into an active, clickable grid layout block.

subComponents.name: Card.Header

border.description: Toggles the bottom structural separator line.

subComponents.description: Top container segment optimized for section titles and action layout headers.

subComponents.name: Card.Body
subComponents.description: Main center layout workspace padding wrapper.

subComponents.name: Card.Footer

bg.description: Enables an explicit low-opacity accent background shading style.

subComponents.description: Bottom tray container optimized for hosting secondary action row item buttons.

variants.default: Standard surface coloration mapping dark mode light-to-dark backdrop transitions.
variants.primary: Low-opacity branded theme with a matching primary border configuration.
variants.background: Deep layout backdrop color matching the global application layout grid scaffolding closely.

internalFeatures: Composite Component Blueprinting: Attaches utility references (`Card.Header`, `Card.Body`, `Card.Footer`) straight to the primary export object, streamlining layout generation workflows.
Interactive State Mutator: Evaluates the presence of `onClick` execution bindings to dynamically alter pointer states (`cursor-pointer`) and inject shadow transition overrides smoothly.

components.description: A highly-customizable low density list card with a slide-down expandable detailed panel.
useCases: Mobile listing viewports that require dense list items.
Detail grids where secondary details should hide behind an inline toggle to preserve viewport heights.

isChecked.description: Applies selective background and border highlight classes.

isExpanded.description: Controls expansion visibility state of the detail panel.

onToggleExpand.description: Toggle click listener callback assigned to the rotating chevron.

leftHeader.description: Header elements positioned inside the left quadrant (e.g., ID link, primary badges).

rightHeader.description: Header elements positioned inside the right quadrant (e.g., amounts, direction arrows, date badges).

expandedContent.description: Detailed panel content containing metadata list grids and bottom drawer actions.

onCardClick.description: Full card mouse click event callback.

variants.Standard: Inherits dark-mode compatible surface light-to-dark background fills and adaptively scales borders when selected.

internalFeatures: Click Propagation Interception: Intuitively ignores click events emitted from selection checkboxes and chevrons to prevent triggers from bubbling up to general card click routines.
Adaptive Highlight: Employs active tint modifiers (bg-primary/5, border-primary) automatically when isChecked is set to true.
Smooth Expandable Transitions: Binds duration-200 animation rules on mount states to drop down detailed grids naturally.
